role_grants._comment_policy_revision_hash: Must equal query.IdentityHash(tenant_id + ":" + workspace_id) = sha256("default:default") — the deterministic policy-epoch value go/cmd/api/seed_initial_admin_helpers.go's newBootstrapLocalIdentityRecord seeds onto the tenants/workspaces rows once at first-run setup claim (identity_local.go's insertBootstrapLocalIdentity) and never changes again for this single-tenant bootstrap deployment. go/internal/storage/postgres/browser_sessions_schema.go's resolveBrowserSessionQuery requires sess.policy_revision_hash = ws.policy_revision_hash on every authenticated read (issued_at not just at login) — a mismatch here silently produces a session that appears to log in successfully (the 303 redirect happens) but then 401s on every subsequent request. Verified live: SELECT policy_revision_hash FROM workspaces WHERE tenant_id='default' against a fresh e2e stack.
